svg.title: Escalation queue design
svg.desc: Escalations should carry answer, evidence, risk reason, user context, SLA, owner, review decision, and correction labels.
svg.text: A reviewer should see why the item was routed and what evidence was used.

g.text: request_id, tenant_id, user intent, draft answer
retrieved evidence, tool plan, confidence signals
risk reason, SLA, queue, owner, audit trail
review decision: approve, edit, reject, escalate
correction labels: wrong evidence, unsafe action, missing context
feedback target: prompt, retrieval, policy, tool, UX

svg.text: human review should create training data, not just approvals
